hero.title: Power Your Journey with ETUK
hero.subtitle: Ethiopia's Premier Electric 3-Wheeler
hero.description: Heavy-duty electric vehicles designed for African roads. Join our network of agents across Ethiopia and be part of the sustainable transportation revolution.

features.title: Why Choose ETUK?
features.subtitle: Built for Ethiopian roads, designed for Ethiopian drivers
features.heroTitle: Get the best experience of our vehicle

powerful.title: Powerful Performance
powerful.description: 4000W motor with 960 N.M torque for tough terrains

range.title: Extended Range
range.description: Up to 180km on a single charge for all-day operation

durable.title: Heavy-Duty Build
durable.description: Robust construction with anti-shock absorbers for African roads

smart.title: Smart Technology
smart.description: GPS tracking, digital cluster, and remote connectivity

eco.title: Eco-Friendly
eco.description: Zero emissions, lithium iron phosphate battery technology

spacious.title: Big & Spacious
spacious.description: Comfortable seating with high load capacity (up to 750kg)

story.title: An Ethiopian Heritage of Modern Excellence
story.description: Soreti International Trading is proud to lead the electric revolution at home. Our state-of-the-art assembly plant in Modjo combines global technology with local expertise to build vehicles that truly understand our terrain.

addis.title: Addis Ababa
addis.desc: Strategic Head Office handling nationwide logistics and agent support.

modjo.title: Modjo Plant
modjo.desc: High-capacity assembly line ensuring genuine parts and local servicing.
